history.created_by: RUN /bin/sh -c set -eux; 	addgroup -S -g 1000 valkey; 	adduser -S -G valkey -u 999 valkey # buildkit
RUN /bin/sh -c set -eux; 	apk add --no-cache 		tzdata 		setpriv 		openssl 		libgcc 	; # buildkit

RUN /bin/sh -c mkdir /data && 	chown valkey:valkey /data && 	chmod 1777 /data && 	mkdir -p /run/valkey && 	chown valkey:valkey /run/valkey && 	chmod 1777 /run/valkey && 	valkey-cli --version && 	valkey-server --version # buildkit
